description_long: This is a beaded necklace featuring a series of round and oval beads in varying shades of blue, turquoise, and cream, some with marbled or floral patterns. The beads are strung together on a dark chain, which is visible at the back of the necklace. The front section of the necklace showcases larger, more decorative beads, while the sides and back transition to smaller, simpler beads. The necklace is displayed on a sleek, black, curved jewelry bust, emphasizing its drape and color contrast. The beads appear to be made of glass or ceramic, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The overall design is vibrant and artistic, with a playful yet elegant motif.
description: A colorful beaded necklace with blue, turquoise, and cream marbled beads on a dark chain, displayed on a black bust. The necklace features a mix of decorative and simple beads with a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of beads, highlighting the larger, patterned beads at the center.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the necklace's drape and the transition from large to smaller beads along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the dark chain and the clasp area, with only the ends of the beads visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the necklace's curve and bead arrangement from another angle.
